package rulecoverage

func PositiveFilterThenCountThenIterate() string {
    ruleID := "filter_then_count_then_iterate"
    family := "hot_path"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Same collection traversed multiple times for filter, count, and process steps."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
